body: """Tight coupling to job_store in session_input_tool.build_and_persist_session_input at lines 196-200. The function directly accesses global job_store, violating standard-0011 (Component Architecture). Refactor to: 1) Accept job_store as parameter via dependency injection, 2) Create SessionInputTool class with __init__ that takes job_store, 3) Remove all direct global variable access from method bodies, 4) Update all callers to pass job_store instance. Follow pattern from job_control_tool refactor. Ensure no remaining direct references to global job_store in the tool code. Create Application context or dependency injection container. Document new instantiation pattern. Test with mocked job_store. Update all callers. Verify backward compatibility or migration path. Ensure consistent dependency injection across all CLI tools."""
